title: Explore Our Menu
description:
Authentic Indian flavors made with traditional recipes
and the finest natural ingredients.

items.title: Starters
items.text: Crispy samosas, pakoras and authentic Indian appetizers.

items.title: Main Dishes
items.text: Aromatic curries, biryanis and traditional Indian dishes.

items.title: Drinks
items.text: Fresh lassi, masala chai and specialty Indian beverages.

items.title: Desserts
items.text: Traditional Indian sweets and delicious dessert options.
